user.title: Connect Roborock account
user.description: If the official Roborock integration is already connected, only the email is required and the existing session is reused. Otherwise enter email + password.

two_factor.title: Two-factor validation
two_factor.description: Enter the code received by email. A code request is sent only once to avoid rate limits.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect account
reauth_confirm.description: Your Roborock session expired. If the official integration is connected, leave password empty to reuse that session. Otherwise enter your password.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Roborock cloud.
error.cannot_send_code: Could not request a new code.
error.too_many_code_requests: Too many code requests. Wait before trying again.
error.official_auth_not_found: No reusable session found in the official Roborock integration. Enter your password.
